proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_051=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with feature_051=0.
Patients with feature_038=1 have longer mean pfs_months than patients with feature_038=0.
Patients with feature_013=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with feature_013=0.
Patients with feature_043=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with feature_043=0.
Higher values of the continuous variable feature_078 are associated with longer pfs_months (positive linear relationship).
Higher values of the ordinal variable feature_057 (levels 0/1/2, plausibly performance status) are associated with shorter pfs_months (negative monotone relationship).
Higher values of the continuous variable feature_092 (mean ~3.8, plausibly serum albumin) are associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher values of the continuous variable feature_099 are associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ feature_078: slope=+0.1765 mo per unit, r=0.766, p=0.00e+00. Strong positive linear relationship.
OLS pfs_months ~ feature_057: slope=-1.1897 mo per level, r=-0.352, p=0.00e+00. Mean PFS by level: 0=5.27, 1=4.05, 2=2.91 (monotone decreasing).
OLS pfs_months ~ feature_092: slope=+0.4654 mo per unit, r=0.102, p=3.25e-115.
OLS pfs_months ~ feature_099: slope=-0.0730 mo per unit, r=-0.123, p=2.21e-167.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After mutual adjustment in a multivariable OLS model including feature_078, feature_057, feature_092, feature_099, feature_051, feature_038, feature_013, and feature_043, feature_078 retains a positive, statistically significant coefficient on pfs_months.
In the same multivariable model, feature_057 retains a negative, statistically significant adjusted coefficient on pfs_months.
In the same multivariable model, feature_092 retains a positive, statistically significant adjusted coefficient on pfs_months.
In the same multivariable model, feature_099 retains a negative, statistically significant adjusted coefficient on pfs_months.
In the same multivariable model, feature_051 retains a negative, statistically significant adjusted coefficient on pfs_months.
In the same multivariable model, feature_038 retains a positive, statistically significant adjusted coefficient on pfs_months.
In the same multivariable model, feature_013 retains a negative, statistically significant adjusted coefficient on pfs_months.
In the same multivariable model, feature_043 retains a negative, statistically significant adjusted coefficient on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Multivariable OLS adjusted coefficient for feature_078: β=+0.1759, p=0.00e+00. R²=0.856 for full model.
analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ feature_078 + feature_057 + feature_092 + feature_099 + feature_051 + feature_038 + feature_013 + feature_043', data=df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across the five categories of feature_064 (race: white/hispanic/black/asian/other).
Mean pfs_months differs across the four categories of feature_018 (insurance: medicare/private/medicaid/uninsured).

analyses.result_summary: Race (feature_064) ANOVA on PFS: F=0.87, p=0.479. Mean PFS by group: asian=4.31, black=4.27, hispanic=4.31, other=4.41, white=4.32. Range across groups = 0.134 mo. No clinically meaningful main effect.
Insurance (feature_018) ANOVA on PFS: F=1.47, p=0.219. Mean PFS by group: medicaid=4.28, medicare=4.31, private=4.33, uninsured=4.25. Range across groups = 0.082 mo.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a multiplicative (interaction) effect between feature_051 and feature_038 on pfs_months — i.e., the difference in PFS between feature_038=1 and feature_038=0 is not the same in feature_051=1 vs feature_051=0 patients.

There is an interaction between binary feature_051 and ordinal feature_057 on pfs_months — i.e., the negative effect of higher feature_057 on PFS differs in magnitude between feature_051=0 and feature_051=1 patients.
There is an interaction between binary feature_038 and ordinal feature_057 on pfs_months — i.e., the protective effect of feature_038=1 differs across levels of feature_057.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ feature_038 * feature_057: interaction β=+0.0047, p=8.92e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is an interaction between continuous feature_078 and binary feature_051 on pfs_months — the slope of pfs_months on feature_078 differs between feature_051=0 and feature_051=1.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ feature_051 * feature_078: interaction β=-0.00712, p=1.90e-09. feature_078 slope: feature_051=0 group=+0.1804, feature_051=1 group=+0.1733.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is an interaction between continuous feature_078 and binary feature_038 on pfs_months — the slope of pfs_months on feature_078 differs between feature_038=0 and feature_038=1.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ feature_038 * feature_078: interaction β=-0.00172, p=2.80e-01. feature_078 slope: feature_038=0 group=+0.1766, feature_038=1 group=+0.1749.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After multivariable adjustment for feature_078, feature_057, feature_051, and feature_038, the positive association of feature_092 with pfs_months persists, and PFS increases monotonically across feature_092 quartiles.

analyses.result_summary: Multivariable adjusted coefficient for feature_092 (controlling feature_078, 057, 051, 038): β=+0.4680, p=0.00e+00. Mean PFS by feature_092 quartile (Q1→Q4): 4.03, 4.28, 4.44, 4.58.
analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ feature_092 + feature_078 + feature_057 + feature_051 + feature_038', data=df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative effect of feature_051 on pfs_months differs in magnitude across racial groups defined by feature_064 (i.e., feature_051 × race interaction).

analyses.result_summary: feature_051 × race interaction (joint F-test of all feature_051:race terms): p=0.690. Stratified feature_051 effect by race: white Δ=-1.341(p=0.00e+00,n=32456); hispanic Δ=-1.389(p=2.33e-152,n=7572); asian Δ=-1.334(p=3.24e-58,n=3003); black Δ=-1.347(p=5.20e-118,n=5996); other Δ=-1.521(p=2.58e-23,n=973).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative effect of feature_051 on pfs_months differs in magnitude across insurance groups defined by feature_018 (i.e., feature_051 × insurance interaction).

analyses.result_summary: feature_051 × insurance (feature_018) joint interaction p=0.688. Stratified feature_051 effect by insurance: medicare Δ=-1.331(p=0.00e+00,n=21105); private Δ=-1.357(p=0.00e+00,n=19898); uninsured Δ=-1.340(p=2.93e-41,n=2006); medicaid Δ=-1.404(p=4.60e-142,n=6991).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive effect of feature_038 on pfs_months differs in magnitude across racial groups defined by feature_064 (feature_038 × race interaction — disparity in apparent benefit).

analyses.result_summary: feature_038 × race joint interaction p=0.032. Stratified feature_038 effect by race: white Δ=+0.921(p=4.77e-129,n=32456); hispanic Δ=+1.114(p=2.03e-41,n=7572); asian Δ=+1.090(p=1.92e-18,n=3003); black Δ=+0.971(p=8.42e-28,n=5996); other Δ=+1.222(p=1.65e-07,n=973).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative slope of pfs_months on feature_057 differs in magnitude across racial groups defined by feature_064 (prognostic feature_057 × race interaction).

analyses.result_summary: feature_057 × race interaction joint p=0.446. feature_057 slope by race: white slope=-1.187(p=0.00e+00,n=32456); hispanic slope=-1.197(p=9.58e-219,n=7572); asian slope=-1.116(p=1.69e-76,n=3003); black slope=-1.210(p=1.21e-178,n=5996); other slope=-1.325(p=7.08e-33,n=973).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is an interaction between feature_051 and feature_013 on pfs_months — the negative effect of feature_013 differs between feature_051=0 and feature_051=1 patients.
There is an interaction between feature_051 and feature_043 on pfs_months — the negative effect of feature_043 differs between feature_051=0 and feature_051=1 patients.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ feature_051 * feature_013: interaction β=-0.0235, p=5.56e-01.
OLS pfs_months ~ feature_051 * feature_043: interaction β=+0.0591, p=1.51e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with the rare binary feature_109=1 (n≈2272) have shorter mean pfs_months than feature_109=0 patients.
Patients with the rare binary feature_067=1 (n≈1506) have longer mean pfs_months than feature_067=0 patients.

After full adjustment for prognostic features (feature_078, feature_057, feature_092, feature_099, feature_051, feature_038, feature_013, feature_043) and insurance, race (feature_064) still has a non-zero joint association with pfs_months.
After full adjustment for prognostic features and race, insurance (feature_018) still has a non-zero joint association with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted race effect (joint F-test) controlling all top prognostic features: F=0.477, p=0.752. Race coefficients: black: β=-0.002(p=9.33e-01); hispanic: β=-0.001(p=9.54e-01); other: β=+0.019(p=5.51e-01); white: β=-0.010(p=5.61e-01).
Adjusted insurance effect (joint F-test): F=0.599, p=0.616. Insurance coefficients: medicare: β=-0.007(p=5.48e-01); private: β=-0.004(p=7.50e-01); uninsured: β=-0.028(p=2.00e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive effect of feature_038 on pfs_months differs in magnitude across insurance groups defined by feature_018.

analyses.result_summary: feature_038 × insurance joint interaction p=0.156. Stratified: medicare Δ=+0.965(p=6.51e-92,n=21105); private Δ=+0.935(p=3.67e-83,n=19898); uninsured Δ=+0.933(p=7.09e-09,n=2006); medicaid Δ=+1.112(p=5.36e-38,n=6991).

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is an interaction between feature_078 and feature_057 on pfs_months — the positive slope of PFS on feature_078 is attenuated at higher feature_057 levels.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ feature_078 * feature_057: interaction β=-0.00720, p=1.30e-18.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The relationship between feature_078 and pfs_months is non-linear: a quadratic term in feature_078 has a non-zero coefficient (positive curvature, i.e., convex).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ feature_078 + feature_078²: linear β=+0.1003, quadratic β=+0.000589 (p=6.99e-34). R²=0.588.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is an interaction between feature_092 and feature_057 on pfs_months — the positive effect of higher feature_092 differs across levels of feature_057.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ feature_092 * feature_057: interaction β=-0.00480, p=8.64e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive effect of feature_038 on pfs_months is preserved within both feature_051=0 and feature_051=1 strata (consistent benefit across the high-risk and low-risk feature_051 subgroups).

Joint risk-stratification by feature_057 (0/1/2) and feature_051 (0/1) yields a clinically meaningful spread in mean pfs_months, with the (feature_057=0, feature_051=0) cell having the longest PFS and the (feature_057=2, feature_051=1) cell having the shortest.
In a fully adjusted model with multiple continuous biomarkers and the leading prognostic features, feature_092 has a positive, statistically significant coefficient on pfs_months.
In the same model, feature_099 has a negative, statistically significant coefficient on pfs_months.
In the same model, feature_009 has a non-zero adjusted coefficient on pfs_months.
In the same model, feature_006 has a non-zero adjusted coefficient on pfs_months.
In the same model, feature_028 has a non-zero adjusted coefficient on pfs_months.
In the same model, feature_070 has a non-zero adjusted coefficient on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: feature_092 adjusted coefficient: β=+0.46618, p=0.00e+00.
feature_099 adjusted coefficient: β=-0.07607, p=0.00e+00.
feature_009 adjusted coefficient: β=-0.00506, p=2.62e-93.
feature_006 adjusted coefficient: β=-0.00041, p=7.59e-17.
feature_028 adjusted coefficient: β=-0.01380, p=2.74e-01.
feature_070 adjusted coefficient: β=+0.00001, p=9.42e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The set {feature_078, feature_057, feature_051, feature_038, feature_092, feature_013, feature_043, feature_099} explains a large fraction (R²>0.8) of variance in pfs_months, with feature_078 contributing the largest partial R².

analyses.result_summary: Full multivariable R²=0.8561. Partial ΔR² contribution of each predictor: feature_078: 0.5827; feature_057: 0.1200; feature_051: 0.0871; feature_038: 0.0270; feature_099: 0.0164; feature_092: 0.0106; feature_013: 0.0050; feature_043: 0.0036.
